summary: A rough parameter-driven OpenSCAD concept for an organic, asymmetrical recovered-shell study. I’ve kept the form intentionally loose and hand-refinable, with a flat stable base, a shell-like outer volume, and a hollowed interior controlled by wall thickness.
fit_checks: Confirm hole spacing on the Recovered Shell Study.
Check fastener clearance and wrench access.
Verify drain path does not weaken the load path.
export_detail: Exported a simple fit-check STL using 54.00 x 82.00 x 145.00 mm derived from the supplied dimensions. CadQuery export failed and fell back safely: Cannot convert object type <class 'cadquery.occ_impl.shapes.Wire'> to vector.
